title: IISER Pune Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Assistant Posts
description: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Project Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the Post-Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the IISER Pune Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the ...
